zh.lifeSummary: 當Maud de Hathersage於1214年出生在英國德比夏爾哈黑薩時，她的父親Matthew de Hathersage45歲，母親Emma Meinill49歲。她於1235年與Walter de Goushill在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1263年9月22日在英國諾廷加姆爾霍福林加姆享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maud de Hathersage于1214年出生在英国德比夏爾哈黑薩时，她的父亲Matthew de Hathersage45岁，母亲Emma Meinill49岁。她于1235年与Walter de Goushill在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1263年9月22日在英国諾廷加姆爾霍福林加姆享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Maud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular form of Matilda . This form was characteristically Low German (i.e. including medieval Dutch and Flemish). The wife of William the Conqueror , who bore this name, was the daughter of Baldwin , Count of Flanders. In Flemish and Dutch the letter -t- was generally lost when it occurred between vowels, giving forms such as Ma(h)auld. Maud or Matilda was also the name of the daughter ( 1102–67 ) of Henry I of England; she was married early in life to the Holy Roman Emperor Henry V , and later disputed the throne of England with her cousin Stephen . In 1128 she married Geoffrey , Count of Anjou. A medieval chronicler commented, ‘she was a good woman, but she had little bliss with him’. The name Maud became quite common in England in the 19th century, when its popularity was influenced in part by Tennyson's poem Maud, published in 1855 , but has not been much used since the early decades of the 20th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Maud de Hathersage was born in 1214, in Hathersage, Derbyshire, England, her father, Matthew de Hathersage, was 45 and her mother, Emma Meinill, was 49. She married Walter de Goushill in 1235, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died on 22 September 1263, in Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maud de Hathersage est née en 1214, à Hathersage, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Matthew de Hathersage, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Emma Meinill, avait 49 ans. Elle a épousé Walter de Goushill en 1235, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée le 22 septembre 1263, à Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maud de Hathersage 1214 in Hathersage, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Matthew de Hathersage 45 und ihre Mutter Emma Meinill 49. Sie hat 1235 in England Walter de Goushill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb am 22. September 1263 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maud de Hathersage è nata il nel 1214 nel Hathersage, Derbyshire, England, sua padre, Matthew de Hathersage, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Emma Meinill, aveva 49 anni. Lei sposato Walter de Goushill nel 1235, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 22 settembre 1263, nel Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, England, all'età di 49 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Maud de Hathersage(이)가 1214년 영국 더비실르 하더사지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Matthew de Hathersage(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Emma Meinill(은)는 49세였다. 그녀는 1235년 영국에서 Walter de Goushill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1263년 9월 22일 영국 노틴그함실르 호버링함에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maud de Hathersage nasceu em 1214, em Hathersage, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Matthew de Hathersage, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Emma Meinill, tinha 49 anos. Ela casou-se com Walter de Goushill em 1235, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 22 de setembro de 1263, em Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maud de Hathersage родилась в 1214 г. в местности хатирсадж, дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени Matthew de Hathersage было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma Meinill, 49. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter de Goushill в 1235 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла 22 сентября 1263 г. в местности ховирингхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maud de Hathersage nació en 1214, en Hathersage, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Matthew de Hathersage, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Emma Meinill, tenía 49 años. Se casó con Walter de Goushill en 1235, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 22 de septiembre de 1263, en Hoveringham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 49 años.
